---
title: "Papers"
---

Placeholder for publications. Quarto supports BibTeX (`@cite-key`) and a `references.bib` file — see [the Quarto citation docs](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/citations.html) when you're ready to add entries.

## Example layout

### 2026

- *Working paper title here* — Trieschman, et al. (placeholder)

### 2025

- *Another paper title here* — Trieschman, et al. (placeholder)
